name: P.G. Nikas S.A.
summary: P.G. Nikas S.A. produces and distributes shelf, bench, and freezing cured meat in Greece. The company offers turkey, chicken, ham and pork shoulder, pariza and parizaki, dry salami, sausages, mortadella, bacon, and lion products. The company provides its products under the Nikas brand name. P.G. Nikas S.A. was founded in 1966 and is based in Agios Stefanos, Greece.
